text: Here's what science actually says about VO2 max basics. VO2 max measures your body’s ability to utilize oxygen during intense exercise. But why does that matter? Higher VO2 max means better endurance and performance. Think of elite athletes versus casual runners. Research shows that VO2 max can predict longevity. The fitter you are, the longer you may live. So, improving your VO2 max isn’t just about better workouts—it’s about a healthier life. Want to learn more about boosting your fitness? Follow for tips and strategies!
